Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The BindBufferLayout method binds the specified state buffer layout to the state buffer. A layout must be defined using this method or SetManualPageSize before calling AllocateMemory, and cannot be changed afterwards.

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The state buffer layout object that defines the page layout for this buffer.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
